column1: # Source: NINJAL BCCWJ short-unit-word frequency list (https://clrd.ninjal.ac.jp/bccwj/freq-list.html)
# Licence: free for research/educational use (NINJAL public).
# Methodology: lemma-level frequency from the Balanced Corpus of Contemporary Written Japanese.
#   Filtered to content POS only (名詞-普通名詞-*, 動詞-一般, 形容詞-一般, 形状詞-*, 副詞, 連体詞);
#   all 固有名詞 (proper nouns), particles, auxiliaries, affixes, pronouns, numerals, and symbols
#   are dropped. Ranks are real BCCWJ frequency ranks.
# Curated probe subset for /vocab level test (vocabulary size estimation, testyourvocab-style).
